channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Final Fantasy 7 Revelation Cuts Key Content From The Original - Insider Gaming
item.description:

item.description:
1. Stellar Blade: BLOOD RAIN dev explains why protagonist looks so young  Niche Gamer

item.title: Warhammer 40K Space Marine Art Wasn't Created Using AI, Says Game Workshop - Kotaku
item.description:
1. Warhammer 40K Space Marine Art Wasn't Created Using AI, Says Game Workshop  Kotaku

  3. Does a six-fingered Space Marine point to AI in Warhammer adverts?  wargamer.com
  4. Warhammer Denies Use Of AI To Generate Six-Fingered Space Marine  TheGamer

item.title: 'Some of you may doubt that I'm actually working on this game.' In the room for an energetic Crazy Taxi demo... - Game File | Stephen Totilo
